description_long: This is a realistic crab with a broad, oval-shaped carapace that is mottled in shades of brown, tan, and gray. The crab features two prominent, asymmetrical claws (chelae), with one noticeably larger than the other, and eight slender walking legs that radiate from its body. The surface of the carapace is slightly textured, with subtle ridges and a matte finish, while the claws display a smoother, glossier appearance. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front corners of the carapace, and the mouthparts are tucked beneath the front edge. The overall form is robust and compact, with the legs and claws splayed outward, giving the crab a defensive posture. The asset is displayed on a neutral surface with a color calibration cube for scale reference.
description: A lifelike crab with a broad, mottled carapace, two large claws, and eight slender legs, featuring textured surfaces and natural coloration.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full width of the carapace, both claws extended, and all legs visible; eyes and mouthparts are partially visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the larger left claw and the curvature of the carapace; legs are seen in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the underside of the claws and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs; carapace appears narrower.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizing the smaller right claw and the segmentation of the legs; carapace texture is visible.
